## Your Question

What do you want to know?

## Context

What have you already tried? Which part of Cast Desktop are you exploring? (e.g., "I'm trying to add a new dashboard page and I'm not sure how to wire the backend API.")

## Related to CAST Framework?

Is this question also about the core CAST framework (agents, hooks, memory)? If so, the [claude-agent-team](https://github.com/ek33450505/claude-agent-team) repo might have better answers — ask there if it's framework-specific.
